# bitHuman SDK -- GitHub Copilot Instructions

The single canonical guide for AI agents in this repo is **`AGENTS.md`** at the repository root. Read and follow it before starting any task — it has the SDK/tool decision tree, API surface, common patterns, repository layout, code conventions, and the what-not-to-do list.

Note: the documentation site (docs.bithuman.ai) is NOT in this repo — it was migrated to the `bithuman-product/public-docs` repo. Make documentation edits there, not here.
